Exclusive to:
All decor items can be placed on a Table.

Contents

  • 1 Replica Relics
  • 2 Art?
  • 3 Replica Sanctum Bowl
  • 4 Skins
  • 5 Trivia
  • 6 Assets
  • 7 Gallery

Replica Relics

Players can craft Replica Relics in the Decorations Filter. To obtain the rare Blueprints required to prototype them, one has to insert a specific combination of items into the Ancient Chest and close it. The items must be placed into the chest in the precise order as shown, and will be consumed in the process. The valid combinations and crafting recipes for the Replica Relics are listed below:

Replica Relic Input in Ancient Chest Crafting Recipe
, , , , , ×2
, , , , , ×1
, , , , , ×2
, , , , , ×1

To unlock all the recipes, the player needs: ×6, ×6, ×6, ×2, ×1, ×3, ×1, ×1, ×5, ×2, ×3

Art?

Art? is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter or Carpentry Filter with 1 Twigs, 1 Rocks, 1 Flint and 1 Gold Nugget and requires a Sawhorse to prototype.

Replica Sanctum Bowl

Replica Sanctum Bowl can be unlocked by the Distilled Knowledge from Orange Fountain of Knowledge. To access it, players have to finish Sequitor's Puzzle first.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Distinguished Rest in Centerpiece Issued for free on the eve of Halloween in 2023.
Woven - Distinguished
Decorator's Collection
Tree's Company
One look at this handcrafted trio and you'll know every little thing is gonna be alright.
Woven - Distinguished
Fantasmical Collection
Horn of Lushness
For when it's time to vine and dine your friends.
Woven - Distinguished
Hallowed Nighst Collection
Rest in Centerpiece
This piece is best placed at the headstone of the table.
Woven - Distinguished
Parlor's Collection
Yoke 'n a Half
The best of the herd.
Woven - Distinguished
Cawnival Collection
Caw of the Cawnival
Come one, come all! It's the Cawnival!
Woven - Distinguished
Rose Collection
Triple Bloom
A burst of color for your table.

Trivia

  • Art? was introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
  • Art? is likely a reference to how some like to place plastic fruits in baskets.
  • Replica Relics and the Replica Sanctum Bowl were previously structures, but have since been changed into movable items.

Assets

  • Art? Dropped
  • Rest in Centerpiece Dropped
  • Yoke 'n a Half Dropped
  • Caw of the Cawnival Dropped
  • Triple Bloom Dropped

Gallery

  • Art? skins concept art from Rhymes with Play

“How sophisticated.”
–Wilson
“Okay.”
–Willow
“Tiny thing has no purpose. Is what makes it fancy.”
–Wolfgang
“The mortal obsession with material things.”
–Wendy
“YOU SERVE NO FUNCTION. WHY ARE YOU HERE”
–WX-78
“I suppose it's pretty, but it doesn't do much.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm pretty sure it's makin' a statement. Aboot something.”
–Woodie
“Bland.”
–Maxwell
“Pretty... useless.”
–Wigfrid
“Is it a toy for us?”
–Webber
“It's no Rodin.”
–Warly
“Hm. Hmmmmm. Art”
–Wormwood
“Looks like some frou-frou clutter to me.”
–Winona
“How wonderfully useless!”
–Wortox
“What this? Can't even eat it!”
–Wurt
“It's cool. I guess.”
–Walter
“I'm sure somebody likes it.”
–Wanda
Art? is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter or Carpentry Filter with 1 Twigs, 1 Rocks, 1 Flint and 1 Gold Nugget and requires a Sawhorse to prototype.

"ruinsrelic_chipbowl"}} Players can craft Replica [[Relic]]s in the [[Decorations Filter]]. To obtain the rare [[Blueprint]]s required to prototype them, one has to insert a specific combination of items into the [[Ancient Chest]] and close it. The items must be placed into the chest in the precise order as shown, and will be consumed in the process. The valid combinations and crafting recipes for the Replica Relics are listed below: {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center" !Replica Relic !Input in [[Ancient Chest]] !Crafting Recipe |- |{{Pic32|Replica Relic Vase}} |{{Pic32|Thulecite Medallion}}, {{Pic32|Cut Stone}}, {{Pic32|Nightmare Fuel}}, {{Pic32|Red Gem}}, {{Pic32|Butterfly}}, {{Pic32|Petals}} |{{Pic32|Cut Stone}} ×2 |- |{{Pic32|Replica Relic Plate}} |{{Pic32|Thulecite Medallion}}, {{Pic32|Cut Stone}}, {{Pic32|Nightmare Fuel}}, {{Pic32|Petals}}, {{Pic32|Berries}}, {{Pic32|Carrot}} |{{Pic32|Cut Stone}} ×1 |- |{{Pic32|Replica Relic Bowl}} |{{Pic32|Thulecite Medallion}}, {{Pic32|Cut Stone}}, {{Pic32|Nightmare Fuel}}, {{Pic32|Rabbit}}, {{Pic32|Carrot}}, {{Pic32|Petals}} |{{Pic32|Cut Stone}} ×2 |- |{{Pic32|Replica Relic Dish}} |{{Pic32|Thulecite Medallion}}, {{Pic32|Cut Stone}}, {{Pic32|Nightmare Fuel}}, {{Pic32|Carrot}}, {{Pic32|Berries}}, {{Pic32|Petals}} |{{Pic32|Cut Stone}} ×1 |} To unlock all the recipes, the player needs: {{Pic32|Thulecite Medallion}} ×6, {{Pic32|Cut Stone}} ×6, {{Pic32|Nightmare Fuel}} ×6, {{Pic32|Purple Gem}} ×2, {{Pic32|Red Gem}} ×1, {{Pic32|Rabbit}} ×3, {{Pic32|Crow}} ×1, {{Pic32|Butterfly}} ×1, {{Pic32|Petals}} ×5, {{Pic32|Berries}} ×2, {{Pic32|Carrot}} ×3 {{clear}} ==Art?== {{Object Infobox |name = Art? |image = Art? Dropped.png |icon = Art?.png |description = A centerpiece to show off your excellent taste. |ingredient1 = Twigs |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Rocks |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Flint |multiplier3 = 1 |ingredient4 = Gold Nugget |multiplier4 = 1 |filter = {{Pic32|Decorations Filter}} {{Pic32|Carpentry Filter}} |tier_text = [[File:Sawhorse.png|24px|link=Sawhorse]] |canBeBurned=1 |perk = Can be placed on a [[Table]]. |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "decor_centerpiece" }} {{Quotes |wilson = How sophisticated. |willow = Okay. |wolfgang = Tiny thing has no purpose. I guess. |wanda = I'm sure somebody likes it. |choose = woodie }} '''Art?''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. It can be crafted in the [[Decorations Filter]] or [[Carpentry Filter]] with 1 [[Twigs]], 1 [[Rocks]], 1 [[Flint]] and 1 [[Gold Nugget]] and requires a [[Sawhorse]] to prototype. {{clear}} == Replica Sanctum Bowl == {{Object Infobox |name = Replica Sanctum Bowl |image = Replica Sanctum Bowl Build.png |icon = Replica Sanctum Bowl.png |description = It's not dirty, it's "developing a patina". |filter = {{pic32|Decorations Filter}} |tier = 11 |ingredient1 = Thulecite Fragments |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Cut Stone |multiplier2 = 1 |tool = Can be [[Tools#Hammering Tools|Hammered]] {{pic|32|Hammer}} |spawnCode = "vaultrelic_bowl" }} '''Replica Sanctum Bowl''' can be unlocked by the [[Distilled Knowledge]] from Orange [[Fountain of Knowledge]]. To access it, players have to finish [[Sequitor's Puzzle]] first. {{clear}} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Art?-0|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Distinguished Rest in Centerpiece''' Issued for free on the eve of Halloween in 2023.
